author.bio: A peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol to make the web faster, safer, and more open.
author.name: IPFS

content.text: Applications are now open for the first ever #IPFS Camp. Join us in Barcelona on June 27-30 for an action-packed hacker retreat designed for builders of the Distributed Web https://camp.ipfs.io/ #libp2p #DWeb
